hero.tag: Homestay · Đà Lạt · Central Highlands · Vietnam
hero.title:
Where
travelersfind home.
hero.subtitle: A trail runner's homestay in the cloud-wrapped mountains of Dalat. 1,500m altitude, rooms from 450,000 VND/night, and a team that speaks your language — whether that's vert, cà phê, or both.

video.label: Welcome to CP12
video.title: Feel it before you arrive.
video.desc: Three minutes through pine forests, misty mornings, and genuine human warmth. This is what Trạm CP12 feels like — before you even pack your bags.
video.tag: 3 min · Welcome Film by CP12 Team

rooms.label: Our Spaces
rooms.heading:
A room for every
kind of traveler.
rooms.intro: From intimate private rooms to our social dormitory — each space at Trạm CP12 is designed with intention. Natural materials, local craft, and exactly the kind of light that makes you want to stay another night.
rooms.comingSoonDesc: Dorm beds are coming — ideal for solo travelers and budget stays. Opening soon.

card1.name: Hồ Xuân Hương
card1.highlight: Active recovery done right. Start with an easy, crisp 5km shakeout run around the lake. At 1,500m elevation, a morning jog here hits different.

card2.name: Vườn Hoa Thành Phố Đà Lạt
card2.highlight: The city's iconic flower park overlooking Xuan Huong Lake. Features hundreds of flower species including hydrangeas, orchids, and roses perfectly curated.

card3.name: Đỉnh núi Langbiang
card3.highlight: 2,167m - The Roof of Da Lat. Skip the easy Radar Peak road to tackle the real 10.6km loop up Ba Mountain. That last 360m push with 717m total elevation gain tests every muscle.

card4.name: Chợ đêm thành phố Đà Lạt
card4.highlight: Swap your trail shoes for sandals. Replenish your calories with authentic bánh tráng nướng and hot soy milk in the chilly mountain air after a big hike.

card5.name: Đồi chè Cầu Đất Đà Lạt
card5.highlight: Dial in the vert for Dalat Ultra Trail! The 20.7-mile loop transitions from smooth dirt roads to technical rocky descents. Log 1,200m D+ before the heat hits.

card6.name: Thiền viện Trúc Lâm Đà Lạt
card6.highlight: Take the cable car up; earn the 4km pine-trail descent back to town. Fully runnable with switchbacks — time it early morning before tour groups hit the trail.

about.label: About CP12
about.heading:
Not just a bed.
A base camp.
about.p1: Trạm CP12 was born from a simple frustration: too many Đà Lạt stays felt like transactions. You'd arrive, sleep, leave — and miss the actual city entirely.
about.p2: We built something different. A place run by locals, designed for connection, and obsessively curated for solo travelers who want the real Đà Lạt — not the brochure version.

perk1.title: Local expertise, freely shared
perk1.desc: Hand-drawn route maps with elevation profiles, Strava segment tips, and hosts who've logged hundreds of km on these very trails.

perk2.title: Built for runners
perk2.desc: Breakfast before long runs, gear drying racks, cold-rinse station, and a recovery corner with muscle rub, and herbal teas.

perk3.title: Solo-traveler focused
perk3.desc: Free group trail runs during the week, sharing route information, and a dorm where runners naturally find each other.

journal.label: The CP12 Journal
journal.heading: Stories from the trail.
journal.subtext: Local insights, runner guides, hidden spots, and honest travel advice — straight from the CP12 team and the people who've stayed with us.

card1.title: Dalat for Runners: Your Complete Trail Guide from Trạm CP12
card1.excerpt: Dalat is trail running's best-kept secret in Southeast Asia — 1,500m altitude, cool air year-round, and 50km of singletrack within 30 minutes of CP12. Here's every route, graded.

card2.title: How to Feel at Home at Trạm CP12
card2.excerpt: There's a particular kind of freedom in traveling alone. Our dorm, morning walks, and weekly Trạm Nights are designed so connections happen naturally.

card3.title: Dalat's Hidden Gems: Beyond the Tourist Trail
card3.excerpt: Skip the brochures. Our team reveals hidden cafés, backstreet food stalls, and underground arts you won't find on TripAdvisor.

cta.label: Ready?
cta.title:
The mountains are
waiting.
cta.sub: Whether you're chasing trails, chasing peace, or just chasing a really good cup of cà phê — Trạm CP12 is ready for you. From 180,000 VND/night.

step1.desc: Facebook, Zalo, email, or phone — we reply within 2 hours

step2.title: Confirm your dates
step2.desc: We hold your room with deposit required

footer.tagline: A trail runner's base camp in the mist-wrapped mountains of Đà Lạt — where solo travelers find their people, runners find their trails, and everyone finds a home away from home.

bottom.made: Made with care in the Central Highlands

testimonials.label: What Guests Say
testimonials.heading: Stories from our guests.
testimonials.r1text: Best sleep in months — over 9 straight hours. Five stars for that alone.
testimonials.r2text: The host insisted on rice and morning tea. Room is clean, fresh-smelling, open view and very quiet. Truly relaxing.

location.label: Find Us
location.heading: At the edge of the city.
location.intro: 228/6 Đường Phú Đồng Thiên Vương, Phường 8, Đà Lạt — 3km from the center, 10 minutes from the night market, and right beside some of the best trails in the highlands.
location.mapLinkLabel: View Trạm CP12 location on Google Maps

q1.question: Is parking available?
q1.answer: Yes — free motorbike and car parking is available on-site.

q2.question: Is breakfast included?
q2.answer: Breakfast is not included. The shared kitchen has a rice cooker, kettle, pots, and fridge — fully usable by all guests.

q3.question: Is there hot water?
q3.answer: Yes — all rooms have hot water showers with electric heaters. Reliable year-round.

q4.question: What is the Wi-Fi speed?
q4.answer: Fiber broadband, typically 50–100 Mbps. Solid for remote work and video calls.

q5.question: What are check-in and check-out times?
q5.answer: Check-in from 14:00. Check-out by 12:00. Early check-in or late check-out is available on request — just message us.

q6.question: Can I store luggage after check-out?
q6.answer: Yes — free luggage storage until 18:00 on your check-out day. Just let us know.

q7.question: How do I get here from the bus station?
q7.answer: Grab or xe ôm (motorbike taxi) takes about 15 minutes. Show the driver: 228/6 Đường Phú Đồng Thiên Vương, Phường 8.

q8.question: What is the deposit and cancellation policy?
q8.answer: We hold your room with a small deposit via bank transfer. Cancellations with 48+ hours notice receive a full refund. Message us on Zalo or Facebook for details.
